Outlet barrel partly obscured by sediment and leaf mat; inlet ID painted as CI-14 on inside wall.
inspection_conclusion: Asset identity is CB-14; CI-14 is legacy paint.

defect_or_findings: CCTV chainage 86 m. Laser trace indicates approximately 0.33 percent grade.
inspection_conclusion: Measured slope differs from hydrology profile slope 0.45 percent.

defect_or_findings: Incoming pipe from CB-14 measured near 101.55 m; outlet to trunk measured near 101.54 m.
inspection_conclusion: Field inverts conflict with GIS outlet invert 101.420 m.

defect_or_findings: Downstream trunk is 600 mm RCP, not 525 mm as shown on 2018 utility composite.
inspection_conclusion: Use inspection diameter for downstream trunk condition.

defect_or_findings: Inlet tag CB-15A in 2025 field book; current asset is CB-15.
inspection_conclusion: Alias should be mapped, not treated as separate inlet.

defect_or_findings: Sediment removed; low point remains due to roadway geometry.
inspection_conclusion: Cleaning reduced blockage but did not change pipe slope or sag elevation.
